text: A pile of rubble blocks the corridor ahead.
Scout a way around
You find a crawlspace skirting the rubble — a modest shortcut.
Every side passage dead-ends. The long way it is.
Clear the rubble
You heave the debris aside, revealing a shortcut deeper into the dungeon.
The rubble is too dense. The party takes the long way around.
Smash straight through
Stone explodes outward — a clean tunnel, and loose valuables in the fill!
The heap shifts and half-buries you.
A rusted portcullis bars the way to a side chamber. A chest gleams beyond.
Look for a winch
You find the rusted winch and crank the gate open enough to reach through.
The winch mechanism is destroyed. No easy way in.
Lift the portcullis
With a groan of straining metal, the gate rises. The chest is yours.
The gate won't budge. You'll need another way in.
Wrench it off its rails
The whole gate tears free! Nothing stands between you and the loot.
The gate snaps back down, catching your arm.
This section of wall sounds hollow.
Tap for weak spots
You find a loose block and slide it out — coins glint in the cavity.
Solid rock everywhere you tap.
Shoulder the wall
Stone crumbles away, revealing a hidden cache of gold!
Just solid rock. The effort leaves you winded and empty-handed.
Bring the whole wall down
The wall collapses — behind it, a forgotten strongbox!
The ceiling sheds rubble on your head.
A frayed rope bridge spans a deep chasm. A chest is tied at its midpoint.
Test each plank first
Slow and steady — you reach the chest and haul it back.
Too many planks are rotten through. Not worth the fall.
Cross with grace
You cross with fluid grace, claiming the isolated chest.
The bridge sways violently. You retreat to solid ground.
Everyone rushes across
The whole party thunders across before the ropes can complain — and strips the bridge of everything!
Planks snap under the weight. Bruised bodies dangle from the ropes.
Crumbling tiles span a gap. A potion sits on a pedestal on the far side.
Chart the solid tiles
You map a safe route tile by tile and retrieve the prize.
Cracks run through every tile. No safe path exists.
Spring across
Light on your feet, you spring across the broken tiles and grab the prize!
A tile gives way beneath you! You take a nasty tumble.
Leap the whole gap
One impossible leap — you stick the landing and sweep the pedestal clean!
You come up short and crash into the pit.
A crumbling ledge hugs the wall, barely a foot wide. Something glints in an alcove ahead.
Rope up and anchor
Anchored and careful, you retrieve the stash without a scare.
No solid anchor point holds. You abandon the attempt.
Edge along the ledge
You edge along with perfect balance and claim the hidden stash.
A pebble skitters into the void. Too risky — you turn back.
Sprint the ledge
You dash the ledge like a mountain goat and scoop up everything in the alcove!
The ledge crumbles mid-stride. You catch yourself hard on the lip.
An ornate chest with a complex locking mechanism sits against the wall.
Study the mechanism
You find the maker's release catch hidden under the lid. Click.
The mechanism is beyond you. The chest stays shut.
Pick the lock
The lock clicks open! Inside you find treasure.
The lock jams. The chest won't budge.
Pry it open
The lid tears off its hinges — everything inside is yours!
A needle trap fires from the strained lock.
A gem rests on a pressure-plate pedestal. One wrong move could trigger a trap.
Map the trigger plates
You chart every plate and lift the gem from the one blind angle.
The trigger pattern defeats you. Better left alone.
Lift the gem gently
With nerves of steel, you lift the gem without triggering the mechanism.
The mechanism clicks ominously. You retreat empty-handed.
Snatch and run
Grab, sprint, slide — the darts hit nothing but wall. What a haul!
A volley of darts finds you mid-sprint.
A tripwire stretches across the passage, connected to something deadly.
Trace the tripwire
You follow the wire to its housing and simply step around the whole rig — pocketing the trapper's stash.
The wire vanishes into the wall. You give it a wide berth.
Disarm the mechanism
You carefully dismantle the trap, revealing a cache of gold behind it.
A dart fires from the wall! You flinch back empty-handed.
Smash through and grab everything
You barrel through before the trap can cycle — and rip its gilded housing off the wall!
The trap fires true. That one hurt.
A hibernating beast blocks the passage to a glittering hoard.
Find a wide berth
You spot a drainage crawl that loops behind the beast. Slow, filthy, effective.
No way around. The beast guards the only path.
Slip past silently
You slip past without a sound, claiming the treasure behind it.
The beast stirs! The party flees the room.
The whole party sneaks the hoard
Impossibly, five sets of boots make no sound. You strip the hoard bare!
Someone kicks a coin. The beast's roar echoes through the dungeon.
The monsters must have hidden something in this room.
Scan for loose stones
A scuffed flagstone gives it away — a small pouch of gold underneath.
If there's a stash here, it's hidden too well.
Ease it out without springing the bell
Tucked behind a loose stone — and rigged to a bell — you find a pouch of gold. The bell never rings.
The bell clangs. The prize drops into a chute and is gone.
Grab it fast
Faster than the trap can trigger — you rip the whole stash free!
The alarm bell rings through the halls. Something answers.
Glowing runes pulse on a sealed stone door.
Recall the sigil lore
You remember this school of warding — and its standard master phrase. The seal fades.
The sigils match nothing you've read.
Trace counter-runes
You trace the counter-runes — the seal dissolves, opening the way to a bonus chamber.
The runes flare but hold. The door stays sealed.
Overload the seal
You pour raw magic into the ward until it bursts — the chamber and its riches lie open!
The ward discharges into you with a crack.
Floating crystals hum with untapped energy, begging for alignment.
Study the resonance
You deduce the alignment sequence and nudge one crystal — the rest follow.
The pattern shifts faster than you can chart it.
Align the crystals
The crystals lock into alignment, creating a teleport nexus for this floor.
The crystals dim. The resonance eludes you.
Force the resonance
You slam the frequencies together — the nexus roars to life, shedding crystal shards worth a fortune!
A crystal shatters, spraying you with shards.
Magical residue lingers from the defeated caster.
Sift the residue
Scorch marks point the way — you sketch a partial route toward the boss lair.
The residue is too scattered to read.
Read the residue
The residue reveals a vision of the boss chamber and its location on your map.
The residue fades too quickly to read.
An ancient stone tablet is carved with intricate script.
Copy the carvings
Your careful rubbing captures a floor plan etched into the border.
The rubbing smears. Nothing legible survives.
Translate the script
You decipher the annals — the floor layout is revealed on your minimap.
The script is too eroded to read.
Divine the meaning
You let the tablet speak through you — the whole floor unfolds in your mind, and the vision points to buried coin!
The divination collapses into noise and a splitting headache.
A sarcophagus bears funerary inscriptions.
Offer a simple blessing
The spirit accepts your respect. The lid slides open an inch — enough.
The blessing goes unanswered. The lid stays sealed.
Recite the burial rites
You recite the ancient rites. The sarcophagus opens, yielding fine grave goods.
A spectral wail echoes through the chamber, but the lid holds.
Force the lid
Stone grinds aside — the occupant was buried with everything they owned!
The lid slams back down on your fingers, and a chill saps your strength.
The room's architectural style is distinctive.
Pace the walls
One wall is two feet thicker than it should be. A secret door!
The walls measure true. Nothing hidden.
Read the builder's style
You recognize the builder's mark — a secret door is nearby!
The room looks ordinary. No secrets here.
This room feels like it might have a concealed storage area.
Check for scuff marks
Drag marks lead to a false panel — a piece of gear inside!
The floor tells you nothing.
Search methodically
Behind a false wall panel, you discover a piece of gear!
You find nothing of value.
Tear out the panels
You rip every panel off the walls — an entire hidden rack of equipment!
A panel splinters, driving spikes into your hand.
A patterned floor stretches ahead. One wrong step and darts fly.
Watch the dust patterns
Undisturbed dust marks the safe tiles. You cross to the pedestal at a stroll.
The dust lies evenly everywhere. No hints.
Deduce the safe path
You map the safe path and reach the reward pedestal at the center.
A wrong step triggers a dart trap! The party takes some scratches.
Dance across the plates
You cartwheel through the dart volleys untouched and empty the pedestal — twice over!
Darts fill the air, and you catch several.
A discarded journal lies in the corner.
Skim the journal
A few legible pages hold useful notes about this dungeon.
The journal is mostly illegible.
Cross-reference the entries
Dates and names line up — the journal yields real tactical insight.
The references lead nowhere.
Rare alchemical herbs grow among the ancient roots.
Gather the obvious herbs
You collect the common healing herbs you recognize on sight.
The plants are common weeds. Nothing useful.
Harvest the rare specimens
You gather several prime specimens — enough for healing potions!
The rare herbs crumble at your touch. Wrong season.
Strip the whole grove
You harvest everything — a full satchel of alchemical treasure!
A defensive bloom bursts, searing your skin with sap.
A dazzling array of fungi covers the walls. Some heal — some kill.
Pick only what you know
A modest handful of trusted caps — the party shares a small meal.
Nothing here you can vouch for. Better hungry than dead.
Sort edible from deadly
You sort the edible from the poisonous. The party shares the safe ones.
Sleep spores trigger! The party coughs in the haze.
Trust your gut and feast
Every cap you pick is a restorative rarity — the party feasts!
That one was definitely poison.
A pool of bubbling gas fills a low section of the room. A stash glints on the far side.
Wait and watch the fumes
The gas ebbs on a cycle. You time your crossing and back with room to spare.
The fumes never thin. Not worth the lungs.
Read the gas currents
You identify the clear route through the gas and reach the stash.
The gas stings your eyes. You retreat.
Hold breath and dash
Thirty seconds of sprinting through poison — and you carry back everything!
You gasp halfway. The gas burns going down.
A once-holy shrine has been corrupted by dark energy.
Cleanse the outer icons
The icons brighten. A gentle warmth settles over the party as it rests.
The grime won't lift. The corruption runs deeper than the surface.
Perform the purification
The shrine glows with restored light — the party rests, fully healed!
The corruption holds. The shrine remains defiled.
Burn out the corruption
Dark energy screams out of the stone — the shrine blazes, and its offering bowl fills with old tithes!
The corruption lashes back before the ritual completes.
Profane symbols seal this door.
Find the anchor glyph
Every ward has a keystone. You scratch through it and the seal unravels.
The glyphs loop into themselves. No anchor found.
Recite the counter-litany
Your recitation breaks the ward! The door swings open to a bonus chamber.
The symbols flash red. The door stays sealed.
Break the door down
Ward or no ward, hinges are hinges. The chamber and everything in it is yours!
The ward detonates with a thunderclap heard through the whole floor.
A buried relic peeks from the rubble.
Dig it out carefully
You free the relic intact — a collector will pay well.
It crumbles as you pull. Just corroded tin.
Identify the relic
You recognize the holy symbol and recover it properly — a valuable find!
Just a rock. Nothing special.
A magical creature is trapped in a cage. It looks scared but not hostile.
Read its body language
You understand what it needs and it warms to you, sniffing out hidden things nearby.
The creature stays pressed to the far bars.
Befriend the creature
You befriend the creature! It follows the party, sniffing out hidden items.
The creature cowers in the back of its cage, unreachable.
Open the cage
It bounds out — and adopts the whole party, dragging over a buried keepsake as tribute!
It panics and rakes you on the way out.
A spooked pack mule carries valuable goods. It's about to bolt.
Calm it with fodder
It settles over a handful of feed and lets you unstrap a saddlebag.
It shies from your hand and trots away.
Soothe the mule
You soothe the mule. It drops its cargo before trotting off.
The mule bolts with the goods.
Grab the harness
You wrestle the mule still — every saddlebag is yours!
A hoof catches you square in the ribs.
A lost drake pup sniffs at your pack.
Leave a scent trail
It follows the trail of jerky right to you — then leads you to its owner's pack.
It loses interest and skitters off.
Win its trust
The drake wags its tail and leads you to its former owner's stash!
It runs away before you can approach.
Something feels wrong about that chest in the corner.
Watch from a distance
You catch it breathing. Mimic confirmed — the party won't be surprised.
It looks like a chest. Probably. You keep your distance anyway.
Study its tells
You spot the telltale signs — it's a mimic! The party strikes first.
Seems normal enough. You proceed cautiously.
Poke it with a sword
It shrieks and spits out its swallowed hoard before fleeing into the dark!
It bites the sword — and your arm with it.
The camp merchant smiles slyly. "Answer my riddle, and the discount is steep."
Recall old riddle-lore
An old chestnut — you've read this one. The merchant grumbles and pays out.
None of your books covered this one.
See through the trick
You see through the merchant's trick and claim the prize!
The riddle stumps you. You pay the normal price.
The room feels slightly too small for its outer dimensions.
Listen for drafts
A whisper of moving air betrays the seam. The hidden room opens.
The air is dead still.
Feel what's off about the room
A section of wall sounds hollow! You break through to a secret room with loot.
Nothing unusual about these walls.
Knock the wall in
The false wall caves — the smugglers' whole cache spills out!
That wall was real. Your shoulder disagrees with it.
A wounded NPC lies against the wall, feverish and weak.
Brew a folk remedy
The tea breaks the fever. Grateful, they tell you of a hidden room.
The remedy soothes but doesn't cure. They sleep restlessly.
Diagnose and treat
You treat the ailment. Grateful, they hand you a key to a locked door on this floor.
The ailment is beyond your skill.
Attempt the risky surgery
The surgery succeeds beyond hope! They press their entire map and coin purse on you.
You do more harm than good. They wave you away, wincing.
After the fight, the party's wounds need tending.
Apply salves and rest
Field salves take the edge off — everyone feels a little better.
The salves have gone rancid. No help there.
Proper triage
You bandage wounds and set minor fractures — everyone regains vitality.
The injuries are too fresh for field medicine to help much.
Aggressive field surgery
Stitches, splints, and one very brave incision — the party feels remade!
The scalpel slips. Now there's one more wound to bind.
A foul contamination seeps from a crack in the floor.
Read the flora die-off
The withered moss maps the seepage. You chart the safe ground for the party.
The die-off pattern makes no sense.
Neutralize the source
You identify the contamination and neutralize it. The area is safe now.
The contamination remains, too hazardous to approach.
Purge it with raw magic
Your purge sterilizes the crack — and crystallizes the residue into something sellable!
The purge backfires, splashing you with the stuff.
Something about this room feels off, like there's more here than meets the eye.
Measure the room
The math doesn't add up — and the missing space holds a cache.
The dimensions check out. Just a room.
Spot the hairline crack
You notice a hairline crack in the masonry — a secret door! It leads to a bonus room.
The walls are blank. Nothing hidden here.
Sound the walls with a hammer
CLANG — hollow! You smash straight into the hidden vault!
The hammering echoes down every corridor on the floor.
The floor has a subtle pattern. One stone might be a pressure switch.
Map the floor pattern
The pattern resolves into a sequence. The last stone sinks with a click.
The pattern repeats endlessly. No anomaly.
Spot the depression
You spot the worn depression. Stepping on it opens a treasure alcove!
Nothing stands out. Just another room.
Stomp every stone
Stomp seventeen finds it — the alcove opens wide, twice the cache you hoped for!
Stomp nine was a spike trigger.
The signs are subtle — disturbed dust, a faint smell. You might not be alone.
Read the tracks
Fresh tracks, headed east. The party won't be caught off guard.
The tracks are old. Or you're reading them wrong.
Notice the disturbed dust
You notice tracks! A lurking monster group is nearby — the party prepares.
No sign of anything lurking nearby.
Torchlight catches something shiny in the rubble.
Follow the glint
A coin — and a thin trail of them leading to a spilled purse.
Just a shadow playing tricks on you.
Dig through the rubble
You pry up a loose stone and find a small cache of gold!
Nothing under the rubble but more rubble.
Heave the slab aside
Under the slab: an entire strongbox, untouched for a century!
The slab slips and pins your foot.
The path ahead forks. One way winds — the other might be a shortcut.
Follow the worn path
Boot-worn stone marks the traveled route — a modest shortcut.
The trail leads in circles.
Read the moss and airflow
The draft and moss growth point true — a shortcut straight toward the boss.
The signs contradict each other.
Take the vertical shortcut
Up the wall, along a beam, down a shaft — you cut past half the floor and land beside someone's dropped purse!
The beam snaps. It's a long way down.
The area has edible plants and hidden caches if you know where to look.
Gather the basics
You scavenge successfully, finding useful supplies.
Nothing useful here.
Harvest medicinal plants
Proper herbs, properly cut — the makings of good medicine.
The medicinal plants are all blighted.
This nook could serve as a safe resting spot — if it's as sheltered as it looks.
Fortify the nook
Barricaded and quiet — the party takes a short rest.
Too exposed even with barricades. No rest here.
Verify it's truly hidden
Sightlines checked, approaches watched — the party rests easy.
You spot three ways a monster could stumble in. Not safe.
Rest right here, quietly
The whole party rests in perfect silence — deeply, wonderfully. And someone finds coins in the bedding!
A snore. A loud one. Things are coming.
The ceiling groans under shifting weight. Treasure lies beyond the unstable stretch.
Chart the stable ground
You guide the party through the unstable area safely, reaching the treasure.
No stable line through. You turn back.
Pick through nimbly
Quick feet on solid spots — you're across and back with the goods.
A near-miss from falling rock ends the attempt.
Everyone sprints through
The party sprints as the ceiling rains stone — everyone through, arms full of everything!
The collapse catches the stragglers.
A spectral sentinel bars the way. It might respond to authority — or a convincing lie.
Cite the old passphrases
The archaic greeting you recall satisfies its ancient orders. It stands aside.
The passphrase has evidently changed in the last thousand years.
Bluff with confidence
Your confident bluff convinces the sentinel you belong here. It reveals the room's treasure.
The sentinel doesn't buy it.
Command it to kneel
It KNEELS. And surrenders the vault inventory it was guarding!
Its shriek of outrage rings through the dungeon.
An official-looking courier approaches with a heavy satchel.
Size up the courier
You read them perfectly and talk your way into a "delivery fee".
They're unreadable. Best not to risk it.
Pose as an inspector
You pose as an inspector so convincingly the courier hands over a tribute of gold!
You're ignored. The courier passes by.
Shake them down
They empty the whole satchel and run!
They blow a warning whistle as they flee.
A rival party's tracks cross yours.
Study the rival tracks
You backtrack them to a stashed supply drop. Finders keepers.
The tracks scatter over stone and vanish.
Plant misdirection
The rivals follow your false trail and abandon their supplies. You claim the spoils!
No one takes the bait.
A pack of scavengers has claimed a cache of treasure.
Shoo them off gently
Calm, firm gestures move them along. Most of the cache remains.
They snap and hold their ground.
A fierce display
Your fierce display sends them scurrying! You collect their hoard.
They scatter, but take the goods with them.
Charge the pack
You scatter them like leaves and claim everything they've ever hoarded!
The pack swarms you before fleeing.
A greedy gatekeeper demands tribute to pass.
Haggle the toll down
You talk the toll down to nothing — and charm a "gift" out of them besides.
The gatekeeper holds firm on the price.
Bully your way through
Your threatening presence convinces the gatekeeper to let you pass — with an apology gift.
The gatekeeper holds firm, unimpressed.
Slip past while they argue
While the gatekeeper lectures your decoy, the rest of you clean out the toll box!
Caught red-handed. The gatekeeper's bellow carries far.
A lone cultist recognizes your reputation.
Read their fears
You see exactly what they dread and let them imagine it. They talk.
Their fanaticism is a closed book.
Press your reputation
The cultist quakes and reveals the boss's weakness!
The cultist flees before you can question them.
Claim to be their dark master
They prostrate themselves and confess EVERYTHING — weaknesses, patrols, and where the tithes are kept!
The real dark master, it seems, has a secret handshake. The alarm goes up.
A fey creature blocks the path, demanding entertainment.
Recite an old fey tale
It knows the tale — and adores your telling. A small boon is granted.
It has heard that one. Many times. It yawns.
Sing for the fey
Your performance delights the fey! It grants a boon.
The fey is bored. You're dismissed with nothing.
Flatter with an invented epic
Your shameless invented epic of its glory earns a mighty boon and a purse of fey gold!
Fey take poorly to flattery they see through. The curse stings.
A magical instrument sits in an alcove with strange notation.
Study the notation
You work out the sequence note by note. A compartment slides open.
The notation defies analysis.
Play the melody
Your melody resonates with the room's magic. A hidden compartment slides open!
A discordant noise. Nothing happens.
Amplify it with magic
The amplified chord opens every compartment in the alcove at once!
The amplified discord howls through the entire floor.
A roaming guard patrols near a treasure.
Wait for the patrol gap
Patience pays. In the gap between rounds, the treasure walks off with you.
The patrol never leaves a gap wide enough.
Put on a show
The guard is captivated! Someone else slips past to snag the treasure.
The guard ignores your antics. No opening.
Pickpocket mid-patrol
You lift the treasure AND the guard's own coin purse in one pass!
A hand on your wrist. A whistle. Running.
The merchant quotes a high price.
Spot what the merchant needs
You notice their worn boots and trade dungeon gossip for a discount.
The merchant's needs remain a mystery.
Charm the merchant
Your silver tongue works wonders — prices reduced for this visit!
The merchant holds firm on prices.
A prisoner cowers in a cage.
Earn trust slowly
Patience wins them over. They whisper of a hidden room.
They stay silent, eyes down.
Convince them quickly
You convince the prisoner you're trustworthy. They reveal a secret room!
The captive clams up and leaves without a word.
Break the cage open
The cage bursts — the grateful captive maps every secret they overheard!
The cage's alarm chain rattles through the halls.
Hostile NPCs are on the verge of attacking.
Find the ringleader
You pick out the instigator and quietly talk them down. The rest deflate.
No clear leader. The mob is a hydra.
Talk them down
Your measured words defuse the tension. The room resolves peacefully, with compensation.
They mutter and disperse, giving nothing.
The party stares them down
Five unblinking stares. The crowd drops their weapons AND their purses.
The staredown fails and the shouting draws every ear on the floor.
A cracked pillar groans over a narrow gap. Bracing it could let the whole party dash through before it falls.
Time the groans
You read the rhythm and pick a safe moment.
The groans are erratic — you wait it out.
Brace and sprint
You shoulder the pillar and the party bolts through, hearts pounding.
The pillar bucks you off — dust and stone rain down.
Hold it for everyone
You hold the stone long enough for five pairs of boots — then leap clear as it crashes!
It gives way mid-crossing. Debris hammers the rearmost.
A massive boulder blocks a side passage — and there's a glint of coin behind it.
Find the leverage point
You locate a fulcrum and roll it aside with ease.
No good angle — it barely budges.
Heave together
Muscle prevails. The hoard behind is yours.
It rolls back, pinning your purse of coin in the dirt.
Crack it with a spike
The boulder splits clean — the treasure spills out!
Shrapnel bursts outward as it cracks.
Scalding geysers erupt in a slow, predictable rhythm across a treasure plaza. The spray itself is invigorating to brave.
Watch the cycle
You map the cycle and pick the calm path.
The pattern is too erratic — you stay put.
Leap between plumes
You weave the eruptions, skin flushed with heat — you feel invincible.
A plume catches you. Painful, but you retreat alive.
Bathe in the spray
The whole party storms the plaza — the steam hardens you for the fights ahead!
Scalding water hammers everyone down.
A grand stair is shedding steps as it falls. Sprinting it grants a rush of speed — if you don't fall.
Find sound treads
You hop the intact stones carefully.
Too risky — you find another way.
Bound up the ruin
You vault the gaps, blood singing — the rush lingers.
A step gives way; you barely catch the rail.
Race the collapse
Five heroes outpace the avalanche of stone — adrenaline carries you onward!
The stair drops away beneath the slowest.
A jewel sits on a poisoned pedestal. The needle is visible — disarming it cleanly pays double.
Map the trigger
You see exactly where not to touch.
The mechanism is too fine to read.
Lift the jewel clean
Steady hands — the jewel slides free, needle never twitching.
The needle pricks before you pull clear!
Strip the whole trap
You disarm it AND take the jewel — poison glands and all, worth a fortune.
A spray of venom catches everyone working close.
A gem-eyed idol sits on a weighted altar. A clever swap might let you walk away with the real prize.
Study the weight
You gauge the idol's heft perfectly.
The weight is unclear — too risky.
Swap in a fake
A bag of sand trades places with the idol. Clean.
The altar sinks — darts whistle out!
Loot the eyes too
Idol, eyes, and all — you strip the altar bare!
A saw-blade swings across the dais.
A bolted nest overlooks the chamber — an assassin's roost, still stocked. Climbing to it unseen is the trick.
Climb the open column
You haul up the column in the open and claim the cache.
The handholds are slick — you slide back.
Slip up the shadowed side
You reach the roost unheard and pocket the goods.
A loose tile clatters down — guards turn.
Rig a rope for the party
A silent rope-line and everyone strips the roost together!
The rope groans; the whole floor hears.
Signs of the local guild are scratched on the wall — a hidden dead-drop may be near.
Read the scratches
The code points to a loose stone — a small purse inside.
The markings mean nothing to you.
Shadow the drop point
You wait motionless, spot the trick stone, and lift a fat pouch.
You fumble the catch — a bell jingles somewhere.
A raw tear in the weave crackles against the wall. Drawing from it could recharge your casters — or burn.
Sip carefully
A trickle of power flows back into your spells.
The rift spits sparks; you withdraw.
Funnel the flow
You shape the rift into a clean current — slots and charges refill!
The weave snaps back, scrambling your thoughts.
Bask in the tear
The party drinks deep — every spell and ability brims full!
Raw magic sears your minds.
A defensive ward-cluster glows on a door. Re-keying it to your side would shield the party — botching it curses.
Recite the old litany
The ward recognizes the rite and hums to life around you.
The litany is half-forgotten — the ward stays cold.
Re-key the runes
You retune the sigils — a shimmering shield wraps the party.
The runes invert — a curse bleeds out!
Overload the ward
The ward flares brilliant and coats everyone in arcane armor!
The ward detonates, cursing all who stand near.
A chained grimoire whispers from a lectern. The lore within is potent — and corrosive to the unprepared mind.
Skim the margins
You glean a fragment of safe, useful lore.
The margins are gibberish.
Read a chapter aloud
Power thrums through you — experience burns itself into memory.
The words writhe — your stomach turns.
Devour the book
The party absorbs the tome entire — a flood of hard-won insight!
Forbidden knowledge scourges your minds.
A salt-rotted map shows the floor's battles. Reading the old deployments lends cunning to your own.
Note the chokepoints
You mark the safest lanes — a useful edge.
The ink has bled beyond reading.
Reconstruct the campaign
The old general's plan clicks into place — your abilities feel refreshed.
The map crumbles as you handle it.
Trace every battle
The whole floor's history unfolds — your party fights like veterans!
You argue the tactics aloud — and loudly.
A tattered banner stands in a forgotten rallying point. Raising it might stir old battle-fury.
Identify the legion
You name the company — a small, steady pride stirs.
The standard is too faded to identify.
Raise the pole
The banner snaps upright — fury kindles in every chest.
The pole rots through; it falls.
Swear the old oath
The oath thunders out — the party is ablaze with rage!
The oath sits wrong on modern tongues — unease spreads.
A grisly tableau — an adventurer, dead of something not quite physical. The scene has a story to tell.
Note the wounds
The wound pattern reveals the killer — and its weakness.
The body tells you nothing new.
Reconstruct the death
You piece together the last moments — the boss's nature is laid bare.
The scene was staged; you can't trust it.
Runes on the floor pulse in a weight-sensitive grid. The right path leads to a coffer; the wrong one, fire.
Read the safe sequence
You decode the safe stones and step across.
The pattern is too dense to parse.
Deduce the pattern
Logic wins — you cross and claim the coffer.
A wrong deduction — gouts of flame!
Sprint the grid
You crack the code on the fly — everyone skates through unburned!
Half the party stands on the wrong stones.
A carpet of crimson moss bleeds a thick, healing nectar — but the spores are toxic if disturbed wrong.
Press the fronds gently
You milk a steady draught of healing nectar.
The moss is dry here.
Harvest the right crop
You pick only the benign heads — a potent party salve.
You bruise the wrong heads — spores puff out.
Wring the whole carpet
You harvest it all — enough nectar to drench the party in healing!
A cloud of crimson spores chokes everyone.
A ring of pale trees hums with cleansing light. Resting in it purges affliction — and steadies the spirit.
Tend the wounded
A soft mend passes over the party's hurts.
The grove stays quiet.
Breathe the pollen
Light fills every chest — poisons and curses burn away.
The pollen is too thin to matter.
Invoke the grove's spirit
The grove blazes — every debuff scourged, the party inspired!
The spirit is offended — it saps your vigor.
An altar waits for an offering of blood or gold. A proper dedication could consecrate your blades.
Leave a token
A faint blessing settles on your weapons.
The altar rejects the token.
Speak the rite of edge
Your blades shimmer with sacred light.
The rite is mispronounced — the altar dims.
Anoint every blade
The whole party's arms blaze with consecrated fire!
The altar finds your offering wanting — it curses you.
A once-holy font now wells with blackness. Cleansing it could purify the party — failing invites the corruption.
Test the water
A careful dip reveals the cleansing was already done.
The blackness recoils — you leave it.
Pronounce the exorcism
The blackness boils away — clear water washes the party clean.
The corruption surges — it stains you.
Bathe in the font
You scour the font and yourselves in one rite — perfectly pure!
The corruption drenches everyone.
A wounded dire-wolf lord snarls from a pit. Dominating it could win a loyal companion for the floor.
Toss it food
It eats, watches you warily, and trots along.
It turns its nose up and limps away.
Hold out a hand
Yellow eyes meet yours — the alpha lowers its head and joins you.
It lunges; you barely pull your hand back.
Stare it down
The whole party holds its gaze — the wolf submits, proud and loyal!
It reads your fear and leads the pack in.
A great stag of strange intelligence paws at a gate. Calming it could lend its vigor to the party's stride.
Approach with grain
It takes the grain and bows its head — a small spring in your step.
It shies away into the dark.
Soothe the beast
You lay hands on its flank — its vigor flows into the party.
It bolts, clipping you with an antler.
Ride it as a mascot
The stag accepts you all — the party moves like the wind!
It panics, trampling everyone in its rush.
A captive taken in the fight sweats and stammers. Reading him right could pry loose the boss's secret.
Offer a deal
He cracks easily — a useful crumb of intel.
He clams up, suspicious of the deal.
Spot the lie he wants to tell
You feed him the lie he's aching to tell — and learn the boss's weakness.
He reads YOU instead — and grins.
A back-room dice table, still felted. The crew here ran — but their pot and their marked dice remain.
Pocket the pot
A quick palm — the house's loss is your gain.
The pot was already emptied.
Read the marked dice
You spot the rig and clean out what they stashed.
You misread the rig — and pay the house back.
A field surgeon's kit lies abandoned, bandages and salves still good. Tending the party now pays double.
Use the salves
A brisk mend passes over everyone.
The salves have gone rancid.
Proper triage
You clean, stitch, and dose — the party is healed AND cleansed.
The kit's poultice was tainted.
A plague-riddled corpse slumps against a sealed door. Diagnosing it reveals what — and who — lies beyond.
Last rites and retreat
You note the sores' pattern as you pray — useful.
The rites done, you learn nothing new.
Open the corpse
The plague's signature is unmistakable — the boss's nature is clear.
A spray of infected blood catches you.
An old sniper's roost overlooks the next hall. The vantage hardens you to what's coming.
Check the roost
You find a serviceable vantage — a small edge.
The roost has collapsed.
Read the kill-zone
You map every angle — the party steels itself, damage halved ahead.
You misread a creak — a crossbow fires!
Spot every trap on the floor
The whole floor's ambushes lay bare — the party becomes iron!
You lean out too far — the old trap still works.
A rolled chart peeks from a dead scout's pack. The boss's location could be yours — if you read it before the ink flees.
Note the landmarks
You get a rough sense of the floor — useful.
The landmarks have shifted.
Read the marching lines
The chart is plain — the boss's chamber stands revealed.
You fumble and tear the chart — and pay for a new copy.
A rack of beast-trophies radiates a faint vigor. Donning a tooth or claw hardens the body.
Take a token
A small,steady fortitude settles in.
The trophies are all rotted.
Choose the right charm
You pick a potent trophy — the party feels fortified.
The beast's spirit objects — a spectral bite.
A scorched, claw-marked trail leads deeper. Reading it tells you exactly what waits at the bottom.
Note the claw count
The track is unmistakably draconic — useful.
The track is too cold to read.
Follow the scorch
You trace the beast — the boss's identity and weakness are clear.
You blunder down a side tunnel, kicking rubble.
A hidden dell offers a brief, safe rest. Setting watch properly is the difference between rest and ambush.
Quick scout
You confirm the dell is safe — a brief breather.
You can't be sure — you push on.
Set proper watch
A clean, short rest — abilities restored.
Your watch fires at shadows — and wakes the wild.
Long rest in the wild
A full, safe recovery in the enemy's blind spot!
Smoke and snoring carry — the whole floor stirs.
A smuggler's post guards a bridge. Flashing the right sign and confidence could wave you through rich.
Read what they want
You catch their tells and play along.
Their game is too opaque.
Fake the password
You bluff the countersign — they wave you through with a "gift".
The bluff fails — they shout the alarm.
Rob them blind
You play them so well they hand over the whole stash!
The con collapses — every post on the floor hears.
A naive cult tends a shrine. Donning their vestments and leading a rite could inspire your party — or draw a curse.
Mutter along
A faint, steady resolve settles on the party.
The rite feels wrong — you stop.
Lead the rite
You play the priest flawlessly — the party leaves inspired.
The cult senses the fraud — the rite inverts.
Bless the whole party
A flawless sermon — the party walks out aflame with confidence!
The heresy is plain — the cult curses you all.
A warlord's old strongbox sits under a glaring guard-statue. Taking it by presence, not force, is the trick.
Claim a small share
You talk your way to a token.
The statue is unmoved.
Demand the box
You shout the old warlord's name — the tribute is yours.
Your voice cracks — the statue's gaze frightens you.
Claim the warlord's name
Five voices bellow the name — the strongbox and more are yours!
The name does not take — dread fills the chamber.
A shield-wall of old constructs blocks the way. A roaring charge could shatter their nerve before a blade is drawn.
Find the weak file
You spot the gap — a small advantage.
The line is solid everywhere.
Roar the charge
Your roar cracks the line — fury carries the party through.
They hold — and the noise echoes on.
Bellow as one
A unified roar shatters the constructs AND every nerve on the floor — the party is berserk!
The constructs reform — and now the floor is awake.
A spectral bard demands a contest before you pass. Winning earns the lore of old masters; losing costs pride.
Cite the classics
Your scholarship impresses — a small share of lore.
The bard finds you dull.
Play a piece
Your tune wins — the bard gifts you a verse of hard-won experience.
You fumble a phrase — the bard jeers.
A full ensemble
The party plays as one — the bard is moved to teach you everything!
A cacophony — the bard's criticism cuts deep.
A music box plays an endless, drowsy tune. Harmonizing could soothe the party's hurts — or lull you senseless.
Rest to the tune
A refreshing pause — minor hurts mend.
The tune is just noise.
Harmonize
You weave the melody into a balm — the party heals.
You nod off mid-phrase; everyone wakes groggy.
A lone, weary guard eyes your coin and your cause. The right words could turn his coat — and arm.
Feel out his price
You learn he's almost ready — a nudge later, he's yours.
He stays cagey.
Appeal to his fatigue
He sighs, drops his pike, and joins the column.
He balks — and demands a bribe you can't refuse.
Turn the whole watch
Your words sweep the watch — a squad of turncoats joins you!
The captain overhears — and fines you for the trouble.
A wax-sealed pardon lies on a clerk's desk. Flashing it could open the sealed vault nearby — or raise the alarm.
Verify the seal
The seal is genuine — you note which vault it opens.
The seal is too smudged to read.
Present the pardon
The vault's ward accepts the seal — and swings wide.
The clerk screams fraud before the ward drops.
Claim a ducal errand
You bluff the whole sealed wing open — secret rooms galore!
The bluff collapses; every ward in the wing shrieks.
Around the merchant's fire, a traveling bard offers a tale for a tale. A good story could lift spirits before you descend.
Recall an old legend
The bard nods — the party feels a familiar, steady resolve.
The bard has heard it before.
Tell your own exploits
Your tale rouses the camp — the party sets out inspired.
The tale falls flat — polite silence.
A sharper-eyed merchant's guard is running a side hustle. Reading him could win a tidy purse.
Watch his hands
You spot the loaded game — a small, easy profit.
His hands are too quick.
Read his hustle
You play along just enough to clean him out.
He reads you back — and lightens your purse.
An iron-bound chest sits unopened, its lock tarnished but cunning. A trap mechanism glints in the keyhole.
Inspect for traps first
You find and ease the trigger. The lock yields meekly.
The mechanism is too well hidden — you resort to brute force.
Pick the lock
Tumblers fall one by one — the lid swings open.
A pin snaps with a sharp click! A dart fires.
Everyone pry it open
Crowbars bite, the hinge screams — and the chest yields its hoard!
Springs and darts! Everyone ducks a heartbeat too late.
A weathered shrine hums with old power. The correct rites might amplify its blessing before you rest.
Offer a quiet prayer
The shrine warms — a ward settles over the party.
The shrine stays cold. No heed.
Channel the resonance
Arcane energy flows — the party is shielded.
The energy disperses into the stone.
Invoke the old name aloud
The shrine blazes! A powerful ward shields everyone.
Blasphemy — the shrine recoils with a frightful roar.
Before the final door, old carvings murmur of what waits beyond. A clever reading could reveal its weakness.
Recall what the carvings depict
The tale names the foe — and where it falters.
The script is too weathered to parse.
Read the binding runes
The runes lay the boss's nature bare. It is marked.
The runes are cold and uninformative.
Demand the truth
The carvings blaze — the boss's weakness is laid open for all to see!
The carvings screech. Something stirs beyond the door.
